entity: Surveillance, Health, Intervention, and Environmental Lead Database project

entity_evidence.text: The expenditure is authorized no sooner than 30 calendar days after written notification to the Chairperson of the Joint Legislative Budget Committee, or whatever lesser time the Chairperson of the Joint Legislative Budget Committee, or the chairperson's designee, may determine.
